scoring.monetization: 1=hard to charge … 5=high intent / clear willingness to pay
scoring.tier: S=best risk-adjusted bet, A=strong, B=viable but crowded/harder, C=niche, low ceiling, or policy/liability risk
scoring.score: 0-100 risk-adjusted: favors high intent + AI-wrapper leverage + low competition + low effort + retention
scoring.formula_intent: Lean toward niches where the user is already mid-task and motivated to pay (scanning a doc, fixing a photo, hitting a deadline).

niches.name: AI Headshot Generator
niches.paywallHook: Generate HD headshots, more styles/outfits, no watermark
niches.notes: Proven buyer intent; FAL/Replicate model behind it. Differentiate by niche: realtors, nurses, devs.

niches.name: AI Object & People Eraser
niches.utility: Tap to remove unwanted objects/people from photos
niches.paywallHook: Unlimited erases, HD export, no watermark
niches.notes: Inpainting API. Universal pain point, instant wow on the first erase.

niches.name: Old Photo Restoration
niches.utility: Repair, deblur and colorize old/damaged photos
niches.notes: Emotional hook (family photos) = high conversion. Older demographic pays.

niches.name: AI Interior Design
niches.utility: Redesign a room from a photo in chosen styles
niches.notes: High intent (people mid-renovation). img2img with style prompts.

niches.name: Plant Identifier & Care
niches.utility: Identify plants from a photo + care reminders
niches.paywallHook: Unlimited IDs, disease diagnosis, care schedule
niches.notes: PictureThis does 8-figures. Vision model + care DB. Recurring care = retention.

niches.name: Calorie Counter by Photo
niches.utility: Snap a meal, get calories & macros
niches.notes: Cal AI proved it. Vision + nutrition DB. Daily-use retention is excellent.

niches.name: Document Scanner + OCR
niches.utility: Scan docs to PDF, OCR, sign, export
niches.paywallHook: Unlimited scans, OCR, signature, no watermark
niches.notes: iScanner-genre (your research). Saturated but huge intent; win on a vertical (receipts, IDs).

niches.name: AI Avatar / Profile Pics
niches.notes: Lensa wave. Trend-sensitive; lean on a fresh style (anime, yearbook, LinkedIn).

niches.name: Background Remover
niches.notes: Easy build (one API). Sellers/marketplace users pay. Crowded — niche to a use case.

niches.name: AI Homework / Math Solver
niches.utility: Photo a problem, get step-by-step solution
niches.notes: Vision+LLM. Students/parents pay. Watch Apple's 'cheating' framing — position as a tutor.

niches.name: Receipt Scanner & Expenses
niches.notes: Freelancers/tax = high intent. OCR + categorize. Recurring use.

niches.name: AI Writing / Email Assistant
niches.utility: Draft, rewrite, fix tone of text/emails
niches.notes: Pure LLM wrapper, cheap to build. Niche it (cold email, dating, reviews) to stand out.

niches.name: Video Compressor
niches.utility: Shrink video size to share/save space
niches.paywallHook: No size limit, batch, keep quality, no ads
niches.notes: On-device AVFoundation, no API cost = pure margin. Evergreen utility.

niches.name: Voice Memo Transcriber
niches.notes: Whisper API + LLM summary. Students/professionals pay per use. Strong retention.

niches.name: Subscription Tracker
niches.utility: Track recurring subs, get renewal reminders
niches.notes: No API cost. Anxiety-driven purchase. Great widget hook.

niches.name: AI Tattoo Designer
niches.utility: Generate tattoo designs from a prompt/style
niches.notes: txt2img with tattoo LoRA/prompts. Fun + commercial intent (before a real tattoo).

niches.name: Passport / ID Photo Maker
niches.utility: Compliant passport/visa/ID photos from a selfie
niches.paywallHook: All country sizes, background removal, print sheet
niches.notes: Bg-remove + size templates. One-time high intent; people pay to avoid a store trip.

niches.name: WiFi QR Code Generator
niches.paywallHook: Branded QR, batch, dynamic QR, analytics
niches.notes: Trivial build. Niche-down the QR genre to escape the saturated 'qr scanner' lane.

niches.name: PDF Tools (merge/split/convert)
niches.paywallHook: Unlimited files, all tools, no watermark
niches.notes: Bundle of tools. Saturated but durable. PDFKit on-device.

niches.name: Intermittent Fasting Tracker
niches.notes: No API cost, strong retention + Live Activity/Dynamic Island hook.

niches.name: Habit Tracker
niches.notes: Saturated and hard to monetize; only worth it with a sharp angle (one habit, aesthetic).

niches.name: Water Reminder
niches.notes: Trivial build but low willingness to pay and very crowded. Volume play only.

niches.name: AI Coloring Book
niches.utility: Turn photos/prompts into coloring pages; color in-app
niches.notes: Relaxation niche; parents + adults. img2img line-art + paint engine.

niches.name: Decibel / Noise Meter
niches.notes: Sensor wrapper. Modest ceiling; bundle with other measure tools.

niches.name: AR Measuring Tape
niches.utility: Measure real-world distances with the camera
niches.notes: ARKit. Apple's own Measure app caps demand. Niche to a trade (flooring, framing).

niches.name: Sleep Sounds & White Noise
niches.paywallHook: Full sound library, mixes, alarm, offline
niches.notes: Strong retention/subscriptions but crowded. Win on curation + aesthetic.

niches.name: Plant Care Reminder
niches.notes: Pairs naturally with plant-id; recurring reminders = retention.

niches.name: Medication Reminder
niches.paywallHook: Unlimited meds, caregiver share, history, widgets
niches.notes: Older/caregiver audience pays. Avoid medical claims (no dosing advice).

niches.name: AI Logo Maker
niches.notes: Small-biz intent. Vector export is the upsell. Crowded — target a vertical.

niches.name: Voice Changer
niches.utility: Transform recorded voice with effects/AI voices
niches.paywallHook: All voices/effects, no watermark, longer clips
niches.notes: Entertainment; younger users, lower pay rate. Trend-driven spikes.

niches.name: Simple Budget Tracker
niches.notes: Durable category but heavy incumbents. Differentiate on simplicity/aesthetic.

niches.name: AI Wallpapers
niches.paywallHook: Unlimited HD, exclusive packs, no ads
niches.notes: High installs, low pay rate; ad+sub hybrid. Volume/trend play.

niches.name: Business Card Scanner
niches.notes: OCR + contact parse. B2B intent. Smaller market but pays well.

niches.name: GPS Speedometer
niches.paywallHook: HUD mode, logging, export, no ads
niches.notes: Low willingness to pay; ad-supported. Filler for the portfolio tail.

niches.name: Tip & Bill Splitter
niches.notes: Trivial, low ceiling. Ad-only. Use to learn the pipeline, not for revenue.

niches.name: Compass & Altimeter
niches.notes: Sensor bundle; weak monetization. Tail-end filler.

niches.name: Dream Journal
niches.notes: Open lane + LLM interpretation upsell. Niche but low competition.

niches.name: Affirmations & Manifestation
niches.notes: Surprisingly strong subscriptions in self-help. Widget + notification retention.

niches.name: Dog/Cat Breed Identifier
niches.utility: Identify breeds from a photo + facts
niches.paywallHook: Unlimited IDs, care info, age/weight tips
niches.notes: Vision model. Fun + pet-parent spend. Pairs with pet-care reminders.

niches.name: Body Progress Photos
niches.paywallHook: Unlimited photos, side-by-side, measurements, privacy lock
niches.notes: Privacy-locked vault is the hook. Fitness audience pays; strong retention.

niches.name: AI Yearbook / 90s Photos
niches.utility: Stylized retro photo packs from selfies
niches.notes: Trend-driven viral spikes; ship fast while a style is hot, then rotate.

niches.name: Colorize B&W Photos
niches.utility: Add realistic color to black-and-white photos
niches.notes: One-API wow. Nostalgia buyers. Pairs with old-photo-restore.

niches.name: Photo Enhancer & Unblur
niches.notes: Remini-genre. Universal need; strong impulse buy on first result.

niches.name: Photo to Anime / Cartoon
niches.notes: Trend-sensitive, younger users. Rotate styles to stay fresh.

niches.name: AI Pet Portraits
niches.utility: Royal/artistic portraits of pets from photos
niches.notes: Open-ish lane, high emotional spend. Print/merch upsell potential.

niches.name: AI Resume Builder
niches.paywallHook: All templates, AI rewrite, PDF export
niches.notes: Job-seeker intent; export is the upsell. Crowded but durable.

niches.name: AI Cover Letter Writer
niches.utility: Tailored cover letters from a job description
niches.notes: Cheap LLM wrapper; pairs with resume builder as a bundle.

niches.name: Invoice Maker
niches.notes: Freelancer/trades pay readily. No API cost. Strong B2B intent.

niches.name: Mileage Tracker
niches.notes: Gig workers/self-employed; tax season spikes. Auto-detect drives is the hook.

niches.name: Work Hours / Timesheet
niches.notes: Hourly workers; export to payroll. No API cost.

niches.name: Barcode Inventory
niches.notes: Small-biz/resellers pay. Camera barcode + simple DB.

niches.name: Smart Grocery List
niches.notes: Crowded, low pay. Only with a strong sharing/aesthetic angle.

niches.name: Meal Planner
niches.utility: Plan weekly meals + auto grocery list
niches.notes: Diet-conscious audience pays. AI meal suggestions optional upsell.

niches.name: Recipe Keeper / Importer
niches.utility: Save recipes from web/photos, scale, plan
niches.paywallHook: Unlimited recipes, web import, sync, scaling
niches.notes: AI import-from-URL/photo is the differentiator. Sticky once stocked.

niches.name: Workout / Gym Log
niches.paywallHook: Unlimited routines, analytics, plate calc, sync
niches.notes: Loyal gym audience but heavy incumbents. Need a sharp UX angle.

niches.name: Stretching & Flexibility
niches.notes: Content-driven; office/older audience pays. Pairs with posture.

niches.name: Posture Reminder
niches.notes: Trivial build; desk-worker pain point. Notification-driven retention.

niches.name: Breathing & Calm
niches.paywallHook: All patterns, sessions, Apple Health, widgets
niches.notes: Wellness subs convert. Simple animation engine; strong widget hook.

niches.name: Sleep Tracker & Alarm
niches.paywallHook: Trends, smart alarm, sounds, no ads
niches.notes: Strong subs but technically heavy + crowded. Only with a real differentiator.

niches.name: Snore Recorder
niches.paywallHook: Full history, trends, sound clips, export
niches.notes: Curiosity + health concern. Audio capture + simple detection.

niches.name: Period & Cycle Tracker
niches.paywallHook: Predictions, symptom insights, partner share, privacy
niches.notes: Huge category, strong retention, but dominant incumbents + privacy scrutiny.

niches.name: Baby Tracker
niches.notes: New parents pay; intense short-term retention. Caregiver sync is the hook.

niches.name: Pregnancy Tracker
niches.notes: 9-month captive audience; content-driven. Avoid medical advice.

niches.name: Gratitude Journal
niches.notes: Self-help subs convert well. Notification + widget retention.

niches.name: Mood Tracker
niches.notes: Sticky for self-aware users. AI insight summaries optional upsell.

niches.name: Meditation Timer
niches.paywallHook: Custom intervals, sounds, stats, Apple Health
niches.notes: Simple but commoditized. Differentiate on minimal aesthetic + sounds.

niches.name: Daily Devotional / Bible
niches.paywallHook: Full plans, audio, journaling, widgets, no ads
niches.notes: Faith audiences show very high retention + willingness to subscribe.

niches.name: Prayer Times & Qibla
niches.paywallHook: Adhan voices, widgets, full duas, no ads
niches.notes: Large, loyal, recurring-use audience. Location + calc + audio.

niches.name: Focus / App Blocker
niches.utility: Block distracting apps during focus sessions
niches.paywallHook: Unlimited sessions, schedules, stats, strict mode
niches.notes: ScreenTime/FamilyControls API. Students/professionals pay to self-control.

niches.name: Pomodoro Focus Timer
niches.notes: Crowded, low pay. Aesthetic + Live Activity angle only.

niches.name: Secure / Locked Notes
niches.paywallHook: Unlimited notes, sync, biometric lock, themes
niches.notes: Privacy-anxiety purchase. Face ID + encryption. Modest ceiling.

niches.name: Photo Vault
niches.utility: Hide private photos/videos behind a lock
niches.paywallHook: Unlimited storage, decoy, break-in alerts, cloud
niches.notes: Reliable seller; privacy fear converts. Decoy/break-in features upsell well.

niches.name: App Icons & Themes
niches.notes: Gen-Z aesthetic spend. Crowded; win on fresh packs + ease.

niches.name: Photo Widgets
niches.utility: Photo/quote widgets for the home screen
niches.paywallHook: All widget types, unlimited, themes, no ads
niches.notes: WidgetKit. High installs; aesthetic audience. Saturated lane.

niches.name: Daily Quotes & Widgets
niches.paywallHook: All categories, custom quotes, themes, no ads
niches.notes: Trivial build; ad+sub. Pairs with affirmations. Tail filler.

niches.name: Lock Screen Customizer
niches.paywallHook: All templates, depth wallpapers, fonts, no ads
niches.notes: Trend-driven volume; low pay. Hybrid monetization.

niches.name: Fonts & Keyboard
niches.notes: Old genre, declining, low pay. Avoid unless bundling.

niches.name: Photo Collage Maker
niches.notes: Saturated, low pay. Only as part of a broader photo bundle.

niches.name: Watermark Add & Remove
niches.utility: Add branded watermarks or remove them
niches.paywallHook: Batch, video, custom logo, no app watermark
niches.notes: Creators/sellers. Remove side uses inpainting. Niche but steady.

niches.name: GIF Maker
niches.paywallHook: HD, no watermark, longer clips, batch
niches.notes: Low pay, fun utility. Ad-supported tail.

niches.name: Screen Recorder Editor
niches.paywallHook: No watermark, HD, editing tools, no ads
niches.notes: iOS records natively; sell the editor/annotation layer.

niches.name: Ringtone Maker
niches.paywallHook: Unlimited, no ads, library, fade tools
niches.notes: Evergreen but friction (GarageBand import). Low pay.

niches.name: Teleprompter
niches.paywallHook: Unlimited scripts, camera record, remote, speed
niches.notes: Creators/speakers pay. Camera-overlay record is the upsell.

niches.name: Guitar Tuner
niches.notes: Pitch detection. Free incumbents cap pay. Bundle tuner+metronome+chords.

niches.name: Metronome
niches.paywallHook: Setlists, time signatures, sounds, no ads
niches.notes: Commodity; low pay. Bundle with tuner.

niches.name: Currency Converter
niches.paywallHook: Offline rates, no ads, widgets, history
niches.notes: Free incumbents + rate API cost. Weak. Travel-bundle only.

niches.name: Unit Converter
niches.paywallHook: All categories, no ads, custom units
niches.notes: Pure commodity. Learning-the-pipeline app only.

niches.name: World Clock & Time Zones
niches.paywallHook: Unlimited cities, widgets, meeting planner, no ads
niches.notes: Remote-work niche. Modest. Widget hook helps.

niches.name: Event Countdown
niches.paywallHook: Unlimited events, all widgets, themes, no ads
niches.notes: Trivial + widget-driven installs. Low pay; aesthetic angle.

niches.name: Loan & Mortgage Calculator
niches.notes: High intent moments but one-time use. Bundle of finance calcs.

niches.name: Net Worth Tracker
niches.notes: FIRE/finance audience pays. Manual entry avoids bank-link complexity.

niches.name: Savings Goal Tracker
niches.notes: Motivational finance; widget + visual progress retention.

niches.name: Flashlight Pro
niches.notes: Built into iOS; near-zero pay. Pipeline practice only.

niches.name: Magnifier & Reading Glass
niches.notes: Accessibility niche; iOS has native magnifier. Low pay.

niches.name: Star & Constellation ID
niches.utility: Point at the sky to identify stars/planets
niches.paywallHook: Full catalog, AR, events, no ads
niches.notes: AR + astronomy data; wow factor. Hobbyists pay. Heavier build.

niches.name: Bird Identifier
niches.paywallHook: Unlimited IDs, sound ID, life list
niches.notes: Birding hobbyists (older, pay). Vision + audio model. Pairs with plant-id stack.

niches.name: Coin & Stamp Identifier
niches.notes: Open lane + collectors pay for valuations. Vision model + value DB.

niches.name: AI Skin Analysis & Routine
niches.utility: Analyze a face selfie, suggest a skincare routine
niches.paywallHook: Full analysis, routine, progress tracking, product matches
niches.notes: High beauty spend + recurring routine retention. Position cosmetic, NOT medical (no diagnosis claims).

niches.name: AI Stylist / Outfit Planner
niches.utility: Catalog your wardrobe, get outfit suggestions
niches.notes: Bg-remove for garment cutouts + LLM styling. Fashion audience pays; sticky once wardrobe is loaded.

niches.name: Car Maintenance Tracker
niches.utility: Log fuel, service, and get maintenance reminders
niches.paywallHook: Unlimited vehicles, reminders, cost reports, export
niches.notes: Car owners; recurring reminders = retention. No API cost. Multi-vehicle households upsell.
